Thank you for installing {{ .Chart.Name }} (version {{ .Chart.Version }}).

Your release is named {{ .Release.Name }} in namespace {{ .Release.Namespace }}.

To reach the frontend, run:

  kubectl --namespace {{ .Release.Namespace }} port-forward \
    svc/{{ include "frontend.fullname" . }} 8080:{{ .Values.service.port }}

{{- if .Values.ingress.enabled }}

The application is exposed via Ingress at:
{{- range .Values.ingress.hosts }}
  http://{{ .host }}
{{- end }}
{{- else }}

Ingress is disabled. Enable it with `--set ingress.enabled=true`.
{{- end }}
